name: cortex-agent-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for Cortex (telegram fork, agent-to-agent comms bridge).

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram messaging bridge (forked — uses harness's shared telegram-core for consistent behavior).

plugins.name: comms-bridge
plugins.description: Agent-to-agent comms channel for Cortex. Long-polls the local comms-bridge HTTP service (127.0.0.1:9475) and exposes a send tool for outbound messages to Max.
